# Glitz & Glamour Studio
> Premium nail, hair, and beauty salon in Vista, CA — by JoJany Lavalle

## About
Glitz & Glamour Studio is a full-service beauty salon located at 812 Frances Dr, Vista, CA 92084.
We specialize in nail art (gel-X, acrylic sets, dip powder), hair services (balayage, cuts, color),
waxing (Brazilian, eyebrow, full-body), facials, and lash extensions.
Owner and lead stylist: JoJany Lavalle.
Phone: +1 (760) 290-5910
Email: info@glitzandglamours.com
Instagram: @glitzandglamourstudio

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://glitzandglamours.com/
- Services & Pricing: https://glitzandglamours.com/services
- Book an Appointment: https://glitzandglamours.com/book
- Gallery / Portfolio: https://glitzandglamours.com/gallery
- Client Reviews: https://glitzandglamours.com/reviews
- Blog: https://glitzandglamours.com/blogs
- Special Events (Weddings, Quinceañeras, Proms): https://glitzandglamours.com/special-events
- FAQ: https://glitzandglamours.com/faq

## Service Categories
- Nails: Acrylic sets, gel-X, dip powder, gel polish, manicures, nail art
- Hair: Haircuts, balayage, highlights, full color, blowouts, deep conditioning
- Waxing: Eyebrow, lip, chin, underarm, arm, leg, bikini, Brazilian
- Facials: Deep cleansing, extraction, hydrating
- Lashes: Classic extensions, volume, hybrid, lash lift, tinting
- Pedicures: Classic, spa, jelly hydrating foot detox

## Location
Vista, CA 92084 (North County San Diego)
Serving Vista, San Marcos, Oceanside, Carlsbad, and surrounding areas.

## Hours
Monday–Friday: 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM
Saturday: 9:00 AM – 4:00 PM
Sunday: Closed
